name: vlds
description: VLDS — a standalone, runtime epistemic layer: a user-controlled dashboard for a model's own epistemics. Three instruments. The gate routes a load-bearing claim through VERIFIABLE → VERIFIED → CONFIRMED / PENDING / HEDGED, so an action proceeds only on a verified claim and an unverifiable one is stated with its uncertainty attached; it tracks each claim's provenance through a neural-net model and classifies it by storage durability. The guide loop disciplines the need behind the claim — asking when it must, reusing what the user already configured, and recording both to an auditable ledger. The inspector re-examines a load-bearing verdict through independent perspectives — blind to the original reasoning, re-grounded in sources — routing it to CORROBORATED, REJECTED, or CONTESTED, reconstructing from outside the calibrated confidence the model cannot read off itself. Standalone; no external plugin dependencies.
